summary: Completed testing of strict AP Invoice auto-post workflow. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Login with admin/admin works, app loads correctly with BC CONNECTED status. The new ap_auto_post_service correctly implements the binary workflow: ALL 4 conditions must pass for AUTO-POST, ANY failure → NEEDS_REVIEW.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - fresh environment with no AP_Invoice documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: AP auto-post service fully tested. check_ap_ready_to_post() correctly validates all 4 conditions: (1) doc_type=AP_Invoice, (2) required fields extracted (invoice#, date, amount, vendor), (3) vendor matched in BC, (4) PO matched if extracted. server.py correctly routes AP_Invoice through ap_auto_post_service and SKIPS auto-clear. mark-ready endpoint calls attempt_ap_auto_post. document_handlers.py reprocess routes AP through ap_auto_post_service. BC_WRITE_ENABLED=true in .env but BC writes may return ReadyForPost if BC API unavailable.
